description_long: This is a modern two-story house surrounded by several tall, conical evergreen trees with a light purple hue. The house features a flat roof with solar panels, large windows, and a spacious wooden deck area that includes a rectangular pool or hot tub. The exterior combines light and dark paneling, with a prominent front entrance accessible via a walkway. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. The landscaping is minimal, focusing on the geometric arrangement of the trees and the clean lines of the house.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a wooden deck with a pool, surrounded by tall purple evergreens.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, walkway, and symmetrical arrangement of trees flanking the house.
description_view_1: Side angle highlighting the deck area with the pool and the dense grouping of trees on both sides.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof, back facade, and the full extent of the deck and pool area.
description_view_3: Oblique rear-side view with a focus on the back and side windows, as well as the surrounding trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and glass panels
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wide door, steps, and a covered porch area, flanked by trees and a straight walkway.
